profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:44:26 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMM08710India political posters8710Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:13:18 UTC. >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
India political posters
Cornell University. Cornell University Library.
8710
0.2 cubic feet.
1940's-present Approximately 50 posters and other ephemera representing leaders and heroes of the Indian subcontinent. <<<<<<< HEAD 1 ======= 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 11014882
Content Description
Approximately 50 posters and other ephemera representing leaders and heroes of the Indian subcontinent.
Preferred Citation
India political posters, #8710. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
Lithographs have been a conspicuous feature of South Asian visual culture from the 19th century on. They have served devotional, pedagogical, political, and decorative purposes in many or most Indian homes and offices. This collection of political posters centers on heroes of the Indian Independence movement.
India -- Politics and government National liberation movements -- India -- History -- 20th century Revolutionaries -- India -- History -- 20th century
